form:Form.name: NucleusWF.Base.Definicion.Organigramas.ESTRUCTURA.form

form:CheckBox.descrip: Indica si se oculta el reporte o no.
form:CheckBox.name: ocultarReporte

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT P.oi_form as id, P.c_form as cod, P.d_form as des FROM wrk01_forms as P WHERE P.oi_form = {#PARAM:@oi_form} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT fg.oi_form_group as id, fg.c_form_group as cod, fg.d_form_group as des FROM wrk01_form_groups as fg WHERE fg.oi_form = {#PARAM:@id} ORDER BY cod ASC ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT fg.o_onchange FROM wrk01_form_groups as fg WHERE fg.oi_form_group = {#PARAM:@id} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT fg.o_onchange FROM wrk01_form_groups as fg WHERE fg.oi_form_group={#PARAM:@id} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql2
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT ff.o_onchange FROM wrk01_form_fields as ff WHERE ff.oi_field={#PARAM:@id} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT ff.oi_field as id, ff.c_field as cod, ff.d_field as des, fg.c_mode as mode FROM wrk01_form_fields as ff, wrk01_form_groups as fg JOIN ff.oi_form_group INNER fg.oi_form_group WHERE ff.oi_form_group = {#PARAM:@id} ORDER BY cod ASC ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT ff.o_onchange FROM wrk01_form_fields as ff WHERE ff.oi_field = {#PARAM:@id} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql2
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT ff.o_onvalidate FROM wrk01_form_fields as ff WHERE ff.oi_field = {#PARAM:@id} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql3
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT ff.o_onchange FROM wrk01_form_fields as ff WHERE ff.oi_field = {#PARAM:@id} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT ff.o_onvalidate FROM wrk01_form_fields as ff WHERE ff.oi_field={#PARAM:@id} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT f.o_scripts_1, f.o_scripts_2, f.o_scripts_3, f.o_scripts_4 FROM wrk01_forms as f WHERE f.oi_form={#PARAM:@id} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT ff.oi_form_group as IdParent FROM wrk01_form_fields as ff WHERE ff.oi_field = {#PARAM:@id} ')/ROWS/ROW
